query_normalized: assessing parcellation sensitivity of hub resilience in healthy connectomes neuroscience
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (b) by measuring node importance (a proxy for hub status) and evaluating the stability/dependence of these metrics on network parameters (terminal time) within the specific domain of brain networks, which directly informs the sensitivity of hub identification to methodological choices in connectome analysis.
